The '''Hunting Lodge''' was a building in the settlement of [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. It was operated by an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] named [[Fazza Utral]], and served as a gathering place for local hunters.

The lodge consisted of one large room with scattered tables and seating. It was well-lit and ventilated, with windows on two walls and a large [[Ceiling fan/Legends|ceiling fan]]. Regulars included hunters [[Dorak Quinn]], [[Komad Fortuna]], and [[Tanis Venn]]. There were also three [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] hunters who were always seen together: [[Gurke]], [[Narkal]], and [[Ugzak]]. A [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]] player by the name of [[Kudos]] was also a patron.

[[Revan/Legends|Revan]] visited the Hunting Lodge in [[3956 BBY]]. At that time, a license from [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]] was required in order to be allowed outside the city walls. Licensed hunters could sell their trophies—[[wraid]] plates and rare [[Krayt dragon pearl/Legends|krayt dragon pearls]]—to Fazza at the lodge.
